sampleNotes:
Attendees: Alice (PM), Bob (Eng), Carol (Design)
- Bob reported backend API v2 is on track, will deploy Wed.
- Carol showed new onboarding mockups; team agreed to adopt option B.
- Decision: Freeze scope for v2.0 after this week.
- Risk: Mobile testing device shortage; Alice to order 2 more iPads by Friday.
- Action: Bob to finalise migration script by Tue EOD.
- Action: Carol to deliver final icons by Thu.

landingHero: Turn messy meeting notes into shareable outcomes.

heroMeta: No signup · Your notes never leave the request
featTitle: Everything you need after a meeting
featSub: Four AI agents work together to produce a complete meeting pack.
feat1Desc: Short, structured summary with key points — without the filler.
feat2Desc: Every decision pulled from raw notes, in a clean bullet list.
feat3Desc: Tasks with owner, due date and priority — ready to paste into your tracker.

feat5Desc: Drop in .txt, .md or .vtt files from Zoom, Teams or Google Meet.

how2Desc: Coordinator, summarizer, actions, email and QA agents run in sequence.

priceSub: Start free. Upgrade when you rely on it.
faq1Q: Where are my meeting notes stored?
faq1A: Nowhere on our server. Each request is processed in memory and discarded once the response returns. The notes are sent to Perplexity's API for generation only.
faq2A: The AI output supports English, Traditional Chinese, Simplified Chinese and Japanese. The UI currently supports English and Traditional Chinese.
faq3Q: Can I upload Zoom or Teams transcripts?
faq3A: Yes, drag-and-drop .vtt or .txt transcript files on the notes area. The content will be extracted and pasted automatically.
faq4A: Yes. Pro is billed monthly and can be canceled anytime. You keep access until the end of your billing period.
ctaFinalTitle: Stop rewriting meeting notes by hand.
ctaFinalSub: Run your first meeting pack in under 30 seconds.
